nodes.title: Improve indent at the end of snakemake file on "Enter" action.
Tests fail on CI with error: File accessed outside allowed roots erorr for project testdata
Wrappers docs url is invalid for wrappers version >= 6.x
2025.2 support
Pythonid.pyAnnotator is deprecated
API change: Use  `PyReturnYieldAnnotatorVisitor ` instead of `ReturnAnnotator`
Add compatibility with PyCharm / IntelliJ Platform IDEs 2025.1
Some code insight features stopped working with Snakemake 9.x release
Inconvenient indent after typing '\n' symbol in a single line sections in the end of file

Code completion for standard resources keys (mem_mb, etc.) + resource_scopes

Support for `storage` directive
